_readme: pipeline v7 — whisper 실측+간격배분+감쇠보정, QA 통과분
title: run every idea by this person
expression: run every idea by this person

sentences.en: they are going to want to do things their way.

sentences.ko: 엄밀히 말하면 내 상사가 되는 거고.

sentences.en: ★ I mean, how can I do what I do if I have to report to someone else, run every idea I have by this person?
sentences.ko: ★ 다른 사람한테 보고하고, 아이디어마다 그 사람 컨펌을 받아야 하는데 내가 어떻게 일을 해?
